subcodes.first_line: Those who claim to love are many, yet they who are faithful and who in truth gaze toward the Most Exalted Horizon are exceeding few [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مدعیان محبت بسیار ولکن اهل وفا که فی الحقیقه بافق اعلی ناظر باشند بسیار کم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God
